GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [item_sk@0 ASC, d_date@1 ASC]
  GpuSortExec: expr=[item_sk@0 ASC, d_date@1 ASC], fetch=100
    GpuProjectExec: expr=[item_sk@0 as item_sk, d_date@1 as d_date, web_sales@2 as web_sales, store_sales@3 as store_sales, max(x.web_sales) PARTITION BY [x.item_sk] ORDER BY [x.d_date ASC NULLS LAST] ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW@4 as web_cumulative, max(x.store_sales) PARTITION BY [x.item_sk] ORDER BY [x.d_date ASC NULLS LAST] ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW@5 as store_cumulative]
      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=14913080
        GpuFilterExec: predicate=max(x.web_sales) PARTITION BY [x.item_sk] ORDER BY [x.d_date ASC NULLS LAST] ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW@4 > max(x.store_sales) PARTITION BY [x.item_sk] ORDER BY [x.d_date ASC NULLS LAST] ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW@5
          GpuWindowExec: wdw=[max(x.web_sales) PARTITION BY [x.item_sk] ORDER BY [x.d_date ASC NULLS LAST] ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW, max(x.store_sales) PARTITION BY [x.item_sk] ORDER BY [x.d_date ASC NULLS LAST] ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW]
            GpuSortExec: expr=[item_sk@0 ASC NULLS LAST, d_date@1 ASC NULLS LAST]
              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=14913080
                GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([item_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                  GpuProjectExec: expr=[CASE WHEN item_sk@0 IS NOT NULL THEN item_sk@0 ELSE item_sk@3 END as item_sk, CASE WHEN d_date@1 IS NOT NULL THEN d_date@1 ELSE d_date@4 END as d_date, cume_sales@2 as web_sales, cume_sales@5 as store_sales]
                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=14913080
                      GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Full, on=[(item_sk@0, item_sk@0), (d_date@1, d_date@1)]
                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=14913080
                          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([item_sk@0, d_date@1], 8), input_partitions=8
                            GpuProjectExec: expr=[ws_item_sk@0 as item_sk, d_date@1 as d_date, sum(sum(web_sales.ws_sales_price)) PARTITION BY [web_sales.ws_item_sk] ORDER BY [date_dim.d_date ASC NULLS LAST] ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW@3 as cume_sales]
                              GpuWindowExec: wdw=[sum(sum(web_sales.ws_sales_price)) PARTITION BY [web_sales.ws_item_sk] ORDER BY [date_dim.d_date ASC NULLS LAST] ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW]
                                GpuSortExec: expr=[ws_item_sk@0 ASC NULLS LAST, d_date@1 ASC NULLS LAST]
                                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=14913080
                                    GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ws_item_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[ws_item_sk, d_date], aggr=[sum(web_sales.ws_sales_price)]
                                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=14913080
                                          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ws_item_sk@0, d_date@1], 8), input_partitions=8
                                            GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[ws_item_sk, d_date], aggr=[sum(web_sales.ws_sales_price)]
                                              GpuProjectExec: expr=[ws_item_sk@1 as ws_item_sk, ws_sales_price@2 as ws_sales_price, d_date@0 as d_date]
                                                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=14913080
                                                  GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(d_date_sk@0, ws_sold_date_sk@0)], projection=[1, 3, 4]
                                                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=14913080
                                                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([d_date_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=14913080
                                                          GpuFilterExec: predicate=d_month_seq@2 >= 1200 AND d_month_seq@2 <= 1211, projection=[0, 1]
                                                            GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                                                              GpuScanExec: batch_size=14913080
                                                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=14913080
                                                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ws_sold_date_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=14913080
                                                          GpuFilterExec: predicate=ws_item_sk@1 IS NOT NULL
                                                            GpuScanExec: batch_size=14913080
                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=14913080
                          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([item_sk@0, d_date@1], 8), input_partitions=8
                            GpuProjectExec: expr=[ss_item_sk@0 as item_sk, d_date@1 as d_date, sum(sum(store_sales.ss_sales_price)) PARTITION BY [store_sales.ss_item_sk] ORDER BY [date_dim.d_date ASC NULLS LAST] ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW@3 as cume_sales]
                              GpuWindowExec: wdw=[sum(sum(store_sales.ss_sales_price)) PARTITION BY [store_sales.ss_item_sk] ORDER BY [date_dim.d_date ASC NULLS LAST] ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW]
                                GpuSortExec: expr=[ss_item_sk@0 ASC NULLS LAST, d_date@1 ASC NULLS LAST]
                                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=14913080
                                    GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ss_item_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[ss_item_sk, d_date], aggr=[sum(store_sales.ss_sales_price)]
                                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=14913080
                                          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ss_item_sk@0, d_date@1], 8), input_partitions=8
                                            GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[ss_item_sk, d_date], aggr=[sum(store_sales.ss_sales_price)]
                                              GpuProjectExec: expr=[ss_item_sk@1 as ss_item_sk, ss_sales_price@2 as ss_sales_price, d_date@0 as d_date]
                                                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=14913080
                                                  GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(d_date_sk@0, ss_sold_date_sk@0)], projection=[1, 3, 4]
                                                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=14913080
                                                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([d_date_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=14913080
                                                          GpuFilterExec: predicate=d_month_seq@2 >= 1200 AND d_month_seq@2 <= 1211, projection=[0, 1]
                                                            GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                                                              GpuScanExec: batch_size=14913080
                                                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=14913080
                                                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ss_sold_date_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=14913080
                                                          GpuFilterExec: predicate=ss_item_sk@1 IS NOT NULL
                                                            GpuScanExec: batch_size=14913080
--- memory ---
GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: row_width=72, subtree_max_row_bytes=144
  GpuSortExec: row_width=72, subtree_max_row_bytes=144
    GpuProjectExec: row_width=72, subtree_max_row_bytes=144
      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=72, subtree_max_row_bytes=144
        GpuFilterExec: row_width=72, subtree_max_row_bytes=144
          GpuWindowExec: row_width=72, subtree_max_row_bytes=96
            GpuSortExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=96
              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=96
                GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=96
                  GpuProjectExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=96
                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=48, subtree_max_row_bytes=96
                      GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=48, subtree_max_row_bytes=96
                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=24, subtree_max_row_bytes=64

                            GpuProjectExec: row_width=24, subtree_max_row_bytes=64
                              GpuWindowExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=56
